name: LG_123_01_ORFLINE_INSERT
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[LG_123_01_ORFLINE_INSERT] ON [dbo].[LG_123_01_ORFLINE] 
AFTER INSERT AS
DECLARE @NUMBER Nvarchar(55)
SELECT @NUMBER=CL.CODE FROM inserted I
LEFT JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CL ON I.CLIENTREF=CL.LOGICALREF

IF(@NUMBER='DENEME_EFK')
BEGIN
SET IDENTITY_INSERT LG_223_01_ORFLINE ON
INSERT INTO [dbo].[LG_223_01_ORFLINE]
           ([LOGICALREF]
		   ,[STOCKREF]
           ,[ORDFICHEREF]
           ,[CLIENTREF]

           ,[DRAFTSTOCKNAME2])

		   ,ISNULL((SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_ITEMS WHERE CODE=(SELECT '153-'+CODE FROM LG_123_ITEMS WHERE CODE='ECTURB100024')),0) AS [STOCKREF]
           ,[ORDFICHEREF]
           ,ISNULL((SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_CLCARD WHERE CODE=(SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_CLCARD WHERE CODE='DENEME_EFK')),1848) AS [CLIENTREF]

           ,[PREVLINEREF]
           ,[PREVLINENO]
           ,[DETLINE]
           ,[LINENO_]
           ,[TRCODE]
           ,[DATE_]
           ,[TIME_]
